message:
So there I was, at the dog park, surrounded by playful pups and their humans, feeling quite proud of my very well-packed doggy bag. You know, the kind that has everything from treats to a spare leash, and even a little first-aid kit (because you never know!). As I watched my pup frolic with her friends, I realized that being the gloriously over-prepared person isn’t just about the stuff you carry; it's about the peace of mind it brings. 

When that unexpected rain shower rolled in, I was the hero of the hour with my trusty doggy raincoat! Everyone else was scrambling for shelter while I calmly put mine on her. Sometimes, it’s the little things that make a big difference, right? 

Have you ever found yourself the go-to person in a situation because of your preparedness? I’d love to hear your stories!
